flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Nazarene College fell 95% between 2021 and 2024 (491 → 23).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eastern Nazarene College fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (44.0% → 28.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Eastern Nazarene College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (56.9% → 39.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Eastern Nazarene College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (378 vs 541).
